description_long: This jewelry object features a prominent, faceted blue gemstone set in a geometric, black metallic frame. The gemstone is cut in a diamond-like shape, with crisp edges and a translucent, icy blue appearance. The setting includes a black, angular base and a matching top, both with a sleek, modern finish. A thin, black metallic band encircles the gemstone horizontally, adding a touch of sophistication and structural support. The overall design is symmetrical and striking, with a strong emphasis on geometric forms and clean lines. The combination of the cool blue gemstone and the dark metal creates a visually appealing contrast, making this piece stand out as a statement accessory.
description: A striking geometric jewelry piece featuring a large faceted blue gemstone set in a sleek black metallic frame with a thin encircling band. The design is modern and symmetrical, emphasizing clean lines and bold contrast.
description_view_0: Front view shows the blue gemstone's faceted face and the black band partially visible on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full circular black band encircling the gemstone and the angular base structure.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, with the gemstone's facets and the black band now visible on the right side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the full circular band and the symmetry of the geometric base and top.
